name: itsumo.inc.
summary: Itsumo.inc. provides e-commerce services to brand manufacturers in Japan. It offers e-commerce marketing and marketplace services. The company's customers include national manufacturers, SMEs, and local governments. It supports companies in various industries, such as cosmetics, food, daily necessities, home appliances, interiors, and babies. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
